channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Herbie Bradley says data curation is undervalued compared to model development
item.description: The debate started after scale AI founder Alexandr Wang faced criticism.
item.content:encoded:
The debate started after scale AI founder Alexandr Wang faced criticism.

Original source: https://x.com/OfficialLoganK/status/2076393038843375810

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/7mj9343u

  • Views: 57,960
  • Likes: 347
  • Bookmarks: 66
  • Replies: 10
  • Posts: 5

Top authors

  • kache
  • kalomaze
  • Herbie Bradley
  • Alex Ratner
@OfficialLoganK I don't understand why all the comments scream to release the new model. If they did and it wasn't amazing you guys would just shit all over it. Wouldn't you rather them release it when it's ready?

item.title: YC partner Tom Blomfield joins Anthropic compute team
item.description: He is taking a leave of absence to work with co-founder Tom Brown.
item.content:encoded:
He is taking a leave of absence to work with co-founder Tom Brown.

Original source: https://x.com/t_blom/status/2076580921398931788

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/hzfgc14v

  • Views: 66,141
  • Likes: 552
  • Bookmarks: 91
  • Quotes: 2
  • Replies: 20
  • Posts: 4

Top authors

  • Tom Brown
  • Andrew Curran
  • Blake Robbins
  • JD Ross
Grouper mafia!

item.title: Users mock Anthropic with meme over repeated Claude Fable 5 extensions
item.description: A viral Wikipedia-style screenshot compared the notices to empty warnings.
item.content:encoded:
A viral Wikipedia-style screenshot compared the notices to empty warnings.

Original source: https://x.com/cocktailpeanut/status/2076368055945384168

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/uhgqry9w

  • Views: 76,538
  • Likes: 749
  • Bookmarks: 65
  • Quotes: 9
  • Replies: 86
  • Posts: 6

Top authors

  • Pete Skomoroch
  • Chubby♨️
  • xlr8harder
Three options: - They release Opus 5 on July 19th or 21st to appease the public and remove Fable 5. - They extend Fable 5's support again, and many people make fun of the fact that Anthropic can't withstand OpenAI's pressure. - They find a final solution by the end of next week to ensure Fable 5's long-term viability (more computing power). I now consider it highly unlikely that virtually nothing will happen and Fable 5 will be removed without a solution.

item.title: OpenAI temporarily lifts subscription caps while optimizing GPT-5.6 Sol
item.description: The context window was reduced to mitigate resource burn.
item.content:encoded:
The context window was reduced to mitigate resource burn.

Original source: https://x.com/thsottiaux/status/2076365965915467978

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/nf7sdptd

  • Views: 64,985
  • Likes: 647
  • Bookmarks: 55
  • Quotes: 2
  • Replies: 48
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Romain Huet
  • Chubby♨️
  • Zephyr
@thsottiaux goat

item.title: Will Depue shows neural network weights retain initialization patterns after training
item.description: Only AdamW with high weight decay successfully erased the watermarks.
item.content:encoded:
Only AdamW with high weight decay successfully erased the watermarks.

Original source: https://x.com/yacineMTB/status/2076626587198337315/photo/1

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/xjh0j7z1

  • Views: 91,683
  • Likes: 991
  • Bookmarks: 292
  • Quotes: 12
  • Replies: 52
  • Posts: 9

Top authors

  • kache
i survived tinystories training! (i need to boost init its too hard to see me from the start)

item.title: Palantir's Alex Karp argues enterprises must retain proprietary data and model weights
item.description: The data sovereignty warning follows Microsoft's launch of its Foundry platform.
item.content:encoded:
The data sovereignty warning follows Microsoft's launch of its Foundry platform.

Original source: https://www.salesforce.com/ca/artificial-intelligence/trusted-ai/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/y5fcjp9v

  • Views: 243,927
  • Likes: 1,019
  • Bookmarks: 437
  • Quotes: 15
  • Replies: 76
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Chamath Palihapitiya
  • xlr8harder
When we look back, Alex Karp may have initiated an important preference cascade around AI sovereignty. It’s worth noting what @Benioff and @satyanadella are both saying: Your knowledge, as a company, is your sovereignty. If you lose it to someone else (anyone else) you are hollowing your organization out. There are many ways to accidentally leak intelligence so you need partners and tools who can sign up for the complexity required to give it to you. See Benioff below and see Satya’s essay linked below.

item.title: Physicist Yuji Tachikawa uses Claude to solve stalled string theory problem
item.description: The model spotted a calculation error and generated SymPy code.
item.content:encoded:
The model spotted a calculation error and generated SymPy code.

Original source: https://x.com/42_gravity/status/2076363358866223314

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/bjms7wrt

  • Views: 70,140
  • Likes: 568
  • Bookmarks: 106
  • Quotes: 1
  • Replies: 31
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Garry Tan
  • j⧉nus
です。ずっと(人間特有の?)直観なんて無い、理解なんてまやかしだと思っているので、機械が人間より知性の面で高性能になっても驚きませんが、理解とか直観というものがあると思う人には Fable は弦理論をちゃんと理解して直観もあるように思うだろうなあという感想です。

item.title: Analysis claims Elon Musk excels at scaling tech from 0.5 to 100
item.description: Chinese competitors instead focus on scaling established innovations from 1 to 100.
item.content:encoded:
Chinese competitors instead focus on scaling established innovations from 1 to 100.

Original source: https://x.com/teortaxesTex/status/2076578512622784525

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/sqz2mlwy

  • Views: 17,236
  • Likes: 479
  • Bookmarks: 79
  • Quotes: 1
  • Replies: 20
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • kache
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
@teortaxesTex Is there anything that is truely a 0 and not a 0.5? Shoulders of giants and stuff

item.title: OpenAI Sol decodes hidden message from visual noise in 40-minute test
item.description: Developer fofr ran the test using a ghost font video frame.
item.content:encoded:
Developer fofr ran the test using a ghost font video frame.

Original source: https://x.com/Moleh1ll/status/2076230275504173139

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/5qqqgb17

  • Views: 38,975
  • Likes: 141
  • Bookmarks: 40
  • Quotes: 2
  • Replies: 14
  • Posts: 4

Top authors

  • Peter Steinberger 🦞
  • fofr
I tried asking Sol to find hidden text with an image that contained a real hidden message. The static image is a 5x5 grid of 25 frames from a ghost font video. After 40mins of thinking and one nudge, Sol gets to almost the correct answer “FOUR SAYS YO”, real message is “FOFR SAYS YO”.

item.title: OpenAI's Gabriel Petersson says human understanding bottlenecks AI's economic impact
item.description: A founder disputes this, citing widespread creative use on social media.
item.content:encoded:
A founder disputes this, citing widespread creative use on social media.

Original source: https://x.com/gabriel1/status/2076658675595268432

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/d3noa64n

  • Views: 6,867
  • Likes: 217
  • Bookmarks: 25
  • Quotes: 3
  • Replies: 25
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Bojan Tunguz
  • gabriel
not quite. people outside of tech use AI for a lot of different creative activities, such as posting LinkedIn slop.
